summary: #92230 is the open canonical PR for adding configured model choices to /model. The hydrated preflight marks it non-security-sensitive and maintainer-editable, but it is not merge-ready: the job pins two concrete repair requirements, the latest hydrated ClawSweeper comment reports an actionable Telegram model reachability defect, and relevant validation has been failing. Because merge/close are blocked and fix/raise_pr is allowed, the executable path is to repair the existing contributor branch and preserve @clawSean's source PR credit.

actions.reason: Repair the existing maintainer-editable contributor PR branch; do not merge or close because both are blocked by job policy and the PR still has bounded actionable repair requirements.
A complete narrow repair artifact is safe and executable for the existing PR branch.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #92230 in place by making the Discord native-command model picker test deterministic and preserving Telegram /model model reachability for callback values that exceed Telegram limits.
repair_candidate.pr_title: feat: add model switch choices to /model
repair_candidate.pr_body:
What Problem This Solves

Repairs the existing #92230 automerge branch so configured /model choices remain available across supported native command surfaces.

Why This Change Was Made

ClawSweeper found that Telegram could emit a partial tgcmd menu when a configured model exceeded Telegram callback limits, making long configured models unreachable. The repair should route Telegram bare /model through the existing browse picker or compact mdl_sel callback path instead of dropping over-limit models. The Discord model picker test also needs a deterministic fixed unbound main route via the existing native-command test seam.

User Impact

Users keep the richer /model picker behavior without losing long configured Telegram models. Contributor credit remains on @clawSean's source PR.

Evidence

Run the focused suite: pnpm test:serial extensions/discord/src/monitor/native-command.plugin-dispatch.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/native-command.model-picker.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-native-commands.test.ts src/auto-reply/commands-registry.test.ts

Then run pnpm check:changed. Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92230.
credit_notes: Repair the existing PR branch so the contributor trail remains on #92230.
Preserve credit for @clawSean as the original PR author and source contributor: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92230.
Do not edit unrelated opencode-go type failures; treat them as baseline only if they appear during changed validation.
